headline: The Retirement Portfolio That Forks Over a $10,000 Check Every Month
summary: Ten thousand dollars a month works out to $120,000 a year, an income stream that exceeds the roughly $68,359 in per-capita disposable personal income reported by the Bureau of Economic Analysis for the first quarter of 2026. For many retirees, that level of cash flow would support a lifestyle well above basic needs. The real ... The Retirement Portfolio That Forks Over a $10,000 Check Every Month

headline: 3 Stocks Retirees Are Quietly Loading Up on in June
summary: Mid-June is when income-focused investors typically run a quiet portfolio audit: are the dividend checks still landing, is the yield still competitive and does each name hold up if the market wobbles into year-end? Three large-cap NYSE names — Verizon (NYSE:VZ), Home Depot (NYSE:HD) and Duke Energy (NYSE:DUK) — keep showing up on that short list, ... 3 Stocks Retirees Are Quietly Loading Up on in June

headline: This 6%-Yielding Stock Keeps Raising Its Payout No Matter What the Economy Does
summary: This company has increased its payout to shareholders for 20 years in a row. You can expect that to continue.

headline: The Nasdaq 100 Has Tripled Since 2020, But These 10 Mega-Caps Are Still Underwater
summary: The Nasdaq 100 has tripled since 2020, but 10 mega-caps still trade below pre-Covid levels. Who's still underwater and why?
